description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this wallet from Newhide is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Newhide perfects this traditional accessorys foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Newhide leather breathes, regulates temperature to the ambience, prevents dust penetration and has high ripping resistance. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet.Dimensions: 10 cm X 9 cmWarranty: 1 yearTwo tone leather upper with two main compartmentsThree credit card slots on either sides of the wallet Pockets on the both sidesBranding embossed on the frontCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
